_doc: Hand-authored Assign-originated runtime-exception replay. Deterministic first-match rules.

rules.match: or jobs logs e5a6c7d8-5555-4abc-9def-000000000005 --level Error --output json

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any unmatched uip command returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent enumerates folders to locate the Shared folder where the faulted job lives.
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the System.Collections.Generic.KeyNotFoundException message and the stack frame pointing at Main.xaml / the Assign.
OPTIONAL — agent may pull error-level logs to corroborate the stack frame; the job-get Info already contains it. min:0 = tracked-but-not-required.
